restoreLastPlaybackSessionDes: Automatically restore the last playback session on app start
autoOpenPlayerDes: Enable/disable auto opening of player full screen on selection of song for play
homeContentCountDes: Select the number of initial homescreen-content(approx). Lesser results faster loading
cacheSongsDes: Caching songs while playing for future/offline playback, it will take additional space on your device
skipSilenceDes: Silence will be skipped in music playback
loudnessNormalizationDes: Sets same lavel of loudness for all songs (Experimental) (Will not work on songs downloaded on previous version(< v1.10.0))
disableTransitionAnimationDes: Enable this option to disable tab transition animation
enableSlidableActionDes: Enable slidable actions on song tile
backgroundPlayDes: Enable/Disable music playing in background (App can be accessed from system tray when app is running in background)
cacheHomeScreenDataDes: Enable Caching home screen content data, Home screen will load instantly if this option is enabled
downloadingFormatDes: Select downloading file format. "Opus" will provide best quality
exportDowloadedFilesDes: Click here to export downloaded file from inApp dir to external dir
clearImgCacheDes: Click here to clear cached thumbnails/images. (Not recommended unless want to refresh cached images data)
ignoreBatOptDes: If you are facing notification issues or playback stopped by system optimization, please enable this option
resetToDefaultDes: Reset app settings to default (Restart required)
resetToDefaultMsg: Settings reset to default completed, Please restart app

if you like this project, don't forget to give a ⭐

helpFirstLaunchContent: Welcome to AMADEUSE MUSIC! When you first launch the app, you'll see the home screen with music recommendations. You can start exploring by searching for your favorite songs or browsing the featured content.
helpInterfaceOverviewContent: The app has several main sections: Home (discover new music), Search (find specific songs), Library (your saved content), and Settings (customize your experience). Navigate between sections using the sidebar on PC or bottom navigation on mobile.
helpBasicNavigationContent: Use the sidebar on PC or bottom navigation bar on mobile to switch between different sections. Tap on any song to start playing, and use the mini-player at the bottom to control playback.
helpPlayingMusicContent: Tap any song to start playing. The mini-player appears at the bottom with basic controls. Tap the mini-player to open the full player interface with advanced controls and lyrics.
helpPlayerControlsContent: The player includes play/pause, skip previous/next, shuffle, repeat modes, and volume control. You can also access the queue, lyrics, and song information from the player interface.
helpQueueManagementContent: View and manage your current playing queue by tapping the queue button in the player. You can reorder songs, remove items, or clear the entire queue.
helpPlayerModesContent: Choose between Standard Player (traditional interface) and Gesture Player (swipe-based controls) in Settings. Gesture Player allows you to swipe left/right to skip songs and double-tap to play/pause.
helpViewingLyricsContent: Tap the lyrics button in the player to view song lyrics. Lyrics are automatically fetched when available. You can switch between synced and plain lyrics modes.
helpSyncedLyricsContent: Synced lyrics highlight the current line being sung in real-time. This provides a karaoke-like experience and helps you follow along with the music.
helpPlainLyricsContent: Plain lyrics show the complete song text without timing synchronization. This is useful when synced lyrics aren't available or if you prefer to read the full lyrics at once.
helpManagingPlaylistsContent: Create custom playlists by tapping the '+' button in the Library section. Add songs to playlists using the 'Add to Playlist' option in song menus. You can rename, reorder, or delete playlists as needed.
helpFavoritesContent: Mark songs as favorites by tapping the heart icon. Access all your favorite songs in the Library > Favorites section. Favorites are automatically synced across your devices.
helpDownloadsContent: Download songs for offline listening by using the download option in song menus. Downloaded songs are available in Library > Downloads and can be played without an internet connection.
helpSearchingMusicContent: Use the search function to find songs, artists, albums, or playlists. The search supports partial matches and suggests results as you type. You can also search by URL to import content.
helpSearchFiltersContent: Filter search results by type (songs, artists, albums, playlists) to find exactly what you're looking for. Use the filter buttons at the top of search results.
helpAudioSettingsContent: Customize audio quality, enable audio effects, and configure playback settings. You can adjust streaming quality, enable skip silence, and access the system equalizer.
helpThemeSettingsContent: Choose between different theme modes: Dynamic (adapts to album artwork), Light, Dark, or System default. The dynamic theme changes colors based on the currently playing song's album art.
helpLanguageSettingsContent: Change the app language from the Settings menu. The app supports multiple languages including English, French, and others. Restart may be required for changes to take effect.
helpPlayerUISettingsContent: Switch between Standard Player and Gesture Player modes. Standard mode provides traditional button controls, while Gesture mode offers swipe-based navigation for a more immersive experience.
helpCommonIssuesContent: If you experience playback issues, check your internet connection and try restarting the app. For sync problems, ensure you're logged into the same account on all devices. Clear app cache if performance is slow.
helpPerformanceTipsContent: To improve performance: close unused apps, ensure stable internet connection, clear app cache regularly, and restart the app if it becomes unresponsive. Consider reducing streaming quality on slower connections.
helpResetSettingsContent: If you encounter persistent issues, you can reset app settings to default values in Settings > Advanced. This will restore all settings but won't affect your library or downloaded content.
goToDownloadPage: Click here to go to download page
resetblacklistedplaylistDes: Reset all the piped blacklisted playlists
stopMusicOnTaskClearDes: Music playback will stop when App being swiped away from the task manager
androidBackupWarning: Not tested: Selecting the checkbox after downloading more than 60 files, process may consume a large amount of memory and could cause the phone or app to crash. Proceed at your own risk.
backupSettingsAndPlaylistsDes: Saves all settings, playlists and login data in a backup file
restoreSettingsAndPlaylistsDes: Restores all settings, login data and playlists from a backup file. Overwrites all current data
restoreMsg:
Successfully restored!
Changes are applied on restart
importPlaylistDesc: Select a previously exported playlist JSON file to import
importErrorFileAccess: Could not access the selected file
importLargeFileNote: Note: Large playlists may take longer to import
exportDataDescription: Export playlists, favorites and settings to a JSON file
importDataDescription: Import playlists, favorites and settings from a JSON file
dataImportedSuccessfully: Data imported successfully. Restart the application to see changes.
